name: refresh_clinic_booking
description: Complete booking system for REFRESH Clinic with dual facility support (Bratislava and Pezinok). Handles service searches, appointment availability, and booking creation with comprehensive error handling and monitoring. GPT-4o powered service matching with 339+ treatments.

request_body_schema.description: Complete REFRESH clinic booking system with dual facility support, smart service matching, real-time availability, and comprehensive booking management for Bratislava and Pezinok locations.

properties.description: REQUIRED: Main tool function. Use: "refresh_booking" (primary booking tool - searches services, checks availability, creates bookings), "get_services_overview" (popular services list), "get_opening_hours" (location/hours info). ALWAYS use refresh_booking for service searches and booking requests.

Specific action to perform: "search_services" (find treatments by name/category), "get_available_times" (check appointment slots), "create_booking" (make reservation), "get_facility_info" (location details), "check_service_details" (treatment information). Use search_services for initial queries.

Service name or search term in Slovak/English. GPT-4o powered matching with cached database. Examples: "hydrafacial", "laserová epilácia", "pleťové ošetrenie", "mezoterapia", "bokombrady", "permanent make-up". System intelligently matches partial names and categories.
Specific service ID for booking or details (e.g., 'hydra-jlo', 'mezo-jalupro', 'peeling-biorepeel', 'laser-epilacia-tvar'). Use after service search returns specific IDs.

Clinic location: "bratislava" (Lazaretská location) or "pezinok" (main facility). Ask customer which location they prefer if not specified. Both facilities offer same services with different staff availability.
Preferred appointment date in DD.MM.YYYY format (e.g., '15.06.2025', '23.12.2024'). Leave empty to find soonest available appointment. System checks real-time availability.
Preferred appointment time in HH:MM format (e.g., '14:30', '09:00'). Only specify if customer requests specific time. System will find closest available slot.
Full customer name for booking confirmation (e.g., 'Jana Novákova', 'Petra Svoboda'). Required only when customer confirms booking. Used for reservation and confirmation.
Customer email address for booking confirmation and reminders. Optional but recommended for booking confirmations and follow-up communications.
Customer phone number in international format (e.g., '+421910123456', '+420777888999'). Required for booking confirmation and appointment reminders.

Preferred staff member name: 'Janka' (Hydrafacial, Esthederm treatments), 'Zuzka' (Mesotherapy, Chemical peeling), 'Veronika' (Piercing, Consultations), or 'any' for no preference. Use specific names only if customer requests.
Customer age - MANDATORY for facial treatments (hydrafacial, peeling, skincare). Always ask for age when booking aesthetic treatments. Used for age-appropriate service selection and safety.

Incremental slot selection for alternative appointment times: 0=soonest available, 1=second soonest, 2=third soonest, etc. Use when customer requests different time options after seeing initial availability.

General search term for services including location keywords. Examples: 'hydrafacial bratislava', 'laser treatments pezinok', 'anti-aging', 'acne treatment'. System performs intelligent semantic matching.
Additional booking notes, special requirements, or customer comments. Include any specific requests, allergies, or preferences mentioned by customer.
